zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Devereux於1387年12月25日出生在英國賀福爾時，他的父親Walter Devereux22歲，母親Agnes Crophull17歲。他於1409年與Elizabeth Maud Bromwich在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1420年6月25日在南非特藍斯瓦阿爾芭特爾享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Devereux于1387年12月25日出生在英国賀福爾时，他的父亲Walter Devereux22岁，母亲Agnes Crophull17岁。他于1409年与Elizabeth Maud Bromwich在英国賀福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1420年6月25日在南非特藍斯瓦阿爾芭特爾享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Devereux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Devereux was born on 25 December 1387, in Herefordshire, England, his father, Walter Devereux, was 22 and his mother, Agnes Crophull, was 17. He married Elizabeth Maud Bromwich in 1409, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 25 June 1420, in Battle, Transvaal, South Africa, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Devereux est né le 25 décembre 1387, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Devereux, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnes Crophull, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Maud Bromwich en 1409, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 25 juin 1420, à Battle, Transvaal, Afrique du Sud, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Devereux am 25. Dezember 1387 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Devereux 22 und seine Mutter Agnes Crophull 17. Er hat 1409 in Herefordshire, England Elizabeth Maud Bromwich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juni 1420 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Battle, Transvaal, Südafrika.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Devereux è nato il il 25 dicembre 1387 nel Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Walter Devereux, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Crophull, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Maud Bromwich nel 1409, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 giugno 1420, nel Battle, Transvaal, Sudafrica, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Devereuxが1387年12月25日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Walter Devereuxは22歳，母Agnes Crophullは17歳であった。1409年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでElizabeth Maud Bromwichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1420年6月25日に南アフリカトランスヴァアルバットルで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Devereux(이)가 1387년 12월 25일 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Devereux(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Crophull(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1409년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Elizabeth Maud Bromwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1420년 6월 25일 남아프리카 트랜스바앨 바틀에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Devereux nasceu em 25 de dezembro de 1387, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Devereux, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Crophull, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Maud Bromwich em 1409, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de junho de 1420, em Battle, Transvaal, África do Sul, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Devereux родился 25 декабря 1387 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Devereux было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Crophull, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Maud Bromwich в 1409 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 25 июня 1420 г. в местности баттл, трансвааль, Южная Африка в возрасте 32 лет.

es.25 December 1387–25 June 1420: 25 de diciembre de 1387–25 de junio de 1420
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Devereux nació el 25 de diciembre de 1387, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Devereux, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Agnes Crophull, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Maud Bromwich en 1409, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de junio de 1420, en Battle, Transvaal, Sudáfrica, a la edad de 32 años.
